title: Consider Defense ETFs Amid Positive Industry Outlook
text: With the current geopolitical landscape and increasing demand for defense equipment, investing in defense ETFs can be beneficial.

title: General Dynamics' (GD) Unit Wins $1.3B Canada Army Contracts
text: General Dynamics' (GD) unit General Dynamics Mission Systems' long-standing relationship with Canada's Army will help expand its footprint in the C4ISR market.

title: General Dynamics Mission Systems-Canada Awarded four Land C4ISR Contracts for the Canadian Army valued at up to CA$1.7 Billion
text: OTTAWA, ON , Dec. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- General Dynamics Mission Systems–Canada announced today that it was awarded four contracts cumulatively valued at up to CA$1.68 billion (US$1.3 billion) by the Government of Canada to support the Land Command, Control, Communications, Computers, Intelligence, Surveillance and Reconnaissance (C4ISR) system for the Canadian Army. The four contracts for the Land Command Support System (LCSS) are: System of Systems Engineering & Integration; Core Network Sustainment Services; Applications Sustainment Services; and Intelligence, Surveillance, Target Acquisition, and Reconnaissance (ISTAR).

title: Congress scraps proposals to ban politicians from trading defense stocks
text: On December 6, House and Senate lawmakers unveiled the text for an $886 billion defense bill, marking a crucial step towards its passage by year-end.

title: General Dynamics Board Declares Dividend
text: RESTON, Va. , Dec. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The board of directors of General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) today declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.32 per share on the company's common stock, payable February 9, 2024, to shareholders of record on January 19, 2024.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins Deal to Aid CVN-77 Naval Ship
text: General Dynamics (GD) wins contract for the planned incremental availability of the USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) aircraft carrier.

title: RTX Secures $145M Contract for PATRIOT Missile Defense System

title: This defense ETF's rally suggests more U.S. funding for Ukraine will come through

title: General Dynamics' (GD) Arm Secures $655M Deal for M1128
